completeness.reasoning: Critical misaligned notebook pattern. The scanner will select generic mmdetection tutorials instead of Semi-DETR core method. The notebooks import standard mmdet but nothing from detr_od or detr_ssod packages. Core method completely missed.

clarity.reasoning: Some documentation exists with decent docstrings in core classes, but hardcoded paths in configs and complex setup instructions limit clarity

modularity.reasoning: Tightly coupled with multiple interdependent custom packages (thirdparty/mmdetection, custom CUDA ops). Cannot import model independently without complex setup

reproducibility.reasoning: Installation fails due to custom CUDA compilation requirements, unpinned dependencies, multi-GPU requirements, and complex mmdetection dependency setup

executability.reasoning: Demo exists but requires external config files, checkpoint downloads, dataset setup, and multi-GPU infrastructure. Cannot run core method without significant manual setup

recommendations: Remove or relocate generic mmdetection notebooks to prevent scanner misalignment
Include sample data and pre-trained checkpoints in repository
Pin all dependencies with specific versions
Provide CPU-compatible execution path without CUDA requirements
Create self-contained demo that works without external downloads
Remove hardcoded paths from configuration files
Simplify installation by removing custom CUDA compilation requirements
